techcrunch.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
techcrunch.summary: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

techcrunch.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
techcrunch.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

techcrunch.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
techcrunch.summary: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

techcrunch.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
techcrunch.summary: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

techcrunch.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
techcrunch.summary: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

techcrunch.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
techcrunch.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

techcrunch.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
techcrunch.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

techcrunch.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
techcrunch.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

techcrunch.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
techcrunch.summary: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.

techcrunch.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
techcrunch.summary: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.
